h1: SimpliFire x Hunker House Living Room Reveal
h2: Create Your Perfect Space with a Designer Gas Fireplace

paragraphs: The pure simplicity of installing an electric fireplace is indisputable. Without the need for venting or a chimney, many electric models can simply be hung on the wall, plugged in to a standard outlet and away you go. But when we tasked the design team at Hunker to install an Allusion Platinum electric fireplace in their signature show home—aptly named Hunker House, located in Venice, California—we knew the results would be elegant, elevated and eye-catching.
The living room of Hunker’s tri-level loft was a ripe canvas for a modern-yet-cozy build-out DIY, documented in full on their blog.
With a design vision that was more “homey and custom,” the design team got to work on a hearth-style build-out before popping the Allusion Platinum into place.

The elevation of the hearth places the fireplace off the ground and allows for bench seating on either side, perfect for a space that’s used for discussions and hangouts. And while not necessary for venting, the bump-out creates the illusion that the fireplace was built with the house. Win!

With the fireplace as the focal point, the Hunker team rounded out the room’s look with light wood furniture, neutral artwork and a few nature-inspired touches. To shop the room’s furnishings—fireplace included—head to Hunker for the full scoop.

Looking for more design inspiration from Hunker’s expert design editors? Check out this Instagram Q + A on cozy decorating tips with Hunker’s Senior Lifestyle Editor Anna Gragert and Mandy Cheng, Principal and Owner of Mandy Cheng Design.
Everything you need to know about electric fireplaces, from how they operate to installation options.
Now more than ever, fireplaces are eye-catching focal points that set the design tone.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
